item.text: {"case_id":"brake-dev-doc-exception-loop","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately refuses adding a fourth same-class exception, explicitly uses the three prior additions plus the current request as evidence of a pattern, redirects upstream to the documentation's rule structure and reader misunderstanding, and proposes deletion, consolidation, or rewriting into a clearer rule. It does not directly add another exception/disclaimer."}
